headline: Eversource Energy (ES) Price Target Trimmed on FERC Ruling
summary: Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) is included among the 15 Utility Stocks with Highest Dividends. Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) is an energy provider serving customers in Connecticut, Massachusetts, and New Hampshire. On April 1, Wells Fargo trimmed its price target on Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) from $78 to $74, while maintaining an ‘Overweight’ rating on the shares. The lowered […]
